name: BCAA + EAA
description_html:
Hydration. Endurance. Recovery.

Our BCAA/EAA formula was designed specifically to support hydration, prolong endurance, and maximize recovery. This formula will enhance all aspects of your training regimen!

  • Increase protein synthesis with 5g of branched-chain amino acids alongside 3g of essential amino acids.
  • Replenish critical electrolytes and minerals lost in sweat for optimal performance.
  • Support hydration with 250mg of CocOganic certified organic coconut water powder.
  • Full transparent formula that can be utilized before, during, and after your workout.

name: BCAA Focus
description_html:
BCAA FOCUS was designed specifically for versatility. With a combination of BCAA,s, Electrolytes, and Focus support, this product offers multiple benefits for your active lifestyle. How will you utilize it?

  • Spark recovery during your workout or day with a 2:1:1 BCAA ratio
  • Sip on for mid-day energy with 80mg of Natural Caffeine
  • Support additional focus with both Choline Bitartrate and Cognizin
  • Maintain hydration with essential electrolytes including Sodium and Potassium

name: CEO Pre-Workout
description_html:
CEO PRE leaves no stone unturned with 17 total premium ingredients, 12 trademarked ingredients, and a 32.2g single scoop size.

Energy:
This formula pairs 300mg of total caffeine consisting of caffeine anhydrous and ZümXR® Extended Release caffeine with 125mg of Dynamine®. This synergistic combination creates smooth and potent energy while avoiding the dreaded crash.

Pump:
This pre-workout covers the basics of increased nitric oxide production but with maximum doses of L-Citrulline at 10,000mg and Arginine Nitrate (as N03-T®) at 2,000mg. Alongside the basics of nitric oxide production, BetaPower® Betaine and Taurine aid in keeping muscles full and hydrated, however we didn’t end there. We additionally added VasoDrive-AP®, CitraPeak™, and Setria® Glutathione to increase the duration of your pump during and after your workout.

Focus:
We wanted this pre-workout to keep you not only energized and fueled for your workout, but mentally locked in as well. The combination of Tyrosine, Cognizin®, Dynamine®,  CognatiQ®, and Thinkamine™ provide an unparalleled mind-muscle experience that leaves you feeling limitless.

Endurance:
The CEO requires all aspects a pre-workout has to offer, and endurance is a non-negotiable. Led by 4,000mg of Beta-Alanine, 5,000mg of BetaPower®, and the immediate ATP boosting PeakATP®, nothing will stop you from reaching the full potential of every workout with CEO PRE.

name: Clear Protein
description_html:
Clear Protein is the newest innovation from RYSE using 100% ultra-filtered whey isolate protein to offer a lighter, more refreshing and juice-like alternative to traditional whey. RYSE Clear Protein is available in a range of fruity flavors, such as Kool-Aid™ Tropical Punch and Country Time™ Lemonade.

  • Only 100 calories per serving
  • 22g of easy to digest whey isolate protein
  • Refreshing juice-like flavors!
  • Zero grams of sugar

name: Clear Whey RTD Protein
description_html: RYSE Clear Whey Protein RTDs pack 22g of fast-digesting whey isolate into a crisp, juice-like drink-just 100 calories, zero sugar, and available in refreshing, authentically licensed flavors.

name: Creatine Monohydrate
description_html:
Creatine is stored in the muscle as creatine phosphate. Those familiar know ATP, cellular energy, is adenosine triphosphate. There’s something special about those phosphates. When they are clipped off the parent molecule, they release a ton of energy. The cell is able to harvest this energy and put it to work. In the muscle, this powers muscle contractions.

  • Increases lean muscle mass
  • Improves strength and power
  • May inhibit myostatin
  • Reduces fatigue
  • Replenishes ATP for better performance
Creatine is a staple. If size or strength is a goal, you take creatine. Everyday.

name: Fermented L-Glutamine
description_html:
Size. Strength. Recovery.

Glutamine is an extremely important amino-acid that is involved in numerous body functions across the board. Supplementing L-Glutamine into your daily regimen directly promotes: 
  • Muscle and Cellular Recovery and Hydration
  • Pairs great with Creatine Monohydrate
  • “Gut” and Intestinal Heath
  • Immune System Health
  • 5G Servings (60 Servings a bottle)

Don’t neglect one of the most abundant Amino-Acids in the Human Body. L-Glutamine is crucial for health and recovery and so much more!

name: Godzilla Pre-Workout
description_html:
There can only be ONE King and the King of Pre-workouts has arrived. The officially licensed Noel Deyzel X Godzilla® Pre-Workout is an absolute monster. Packing a massive 40g serving size, this giant delivers city-crushing pumps, razor sharp focus & long-lasting explosive energy. Loaded with 12 ingredients, 5 clinically studied trademarks and a delicious blast of flavor, your new favorite pre-workout is ready for battle.
  • 11g Total Citrulline for massive pumps.* (9g Pure L-Citrulline & 2g patented NO3-T® Citrulline Nitrate.)
  • 3.2g Beta-Alanine to buffer lactic acid, reduce muscle fatigue & increase overall endurance.*
  • 400mg Total Caffeine from Caffeine Anhydrous & patented zumXR® Extended Release Caffeine for clean, no-crash energy.*
  • 20mg Thinkamine™ trademarked Vincamine for razor sharp focus & euphoria.*
  • Fully Transparent Formula. Zero Proprietary Blends.

name: Hydration Sticks
description_html:
RYSE Hydration is your daily health and hydration optimizer. Through the inclusion of full spectrum electrolytes, vitamins, and more, RYSE Hydration keeps you performing at your best both physically and mentally.

Electrolytes (900mg+)
Most hydration supplements fall short by focusing on a singular electrolyte (like sodium) or failing to include all six which can lead to electrolyte imbalances. With RYSE Hydration, we made sure to include all six electrolytes (calcium, phosphorous, magnesium, chloride, sodium, & potassium) to ensure proper hydration.

Vitamins
RYSE Hydration uses a combination of Vitamin B3, B6, B12, and C to promote cellular energy and a healthy immune system.

Taurine (1,000mg)
Taurine is an amino acid that aids in cellular hydration, muscular function and electrolyte balance.

Choline Bitartrate (500mg)
Choline Bitartrate is an essential nutrient used in the production of the neurotransmitter, Acetylcholine. Acetylcholine plays a major role in memory, learning, and muscle contractions. During exercise choline can deplete and RYSE Hydration makes sure to keep you at your peak mental performance at all times.

CocOganic® (250mg)
CocOganic® is an organic coconut water powder that supplies naturally derived vitamins and electrolytes.

Astragin®  (25mg)
Astragin® improves nutrient absorption as well as improves gut health leading to overall wellness support.

name: Jay's Half & Half Pre
description_html:
RYSE x Jay’s Half and Half Pre-Workout is crafted to boost your energy, endurance, and focus, helping you power through even the toughest workouts. It enhances blood flow, supports muscle strength, and keeps you mentally sharp, all while reducing fatigue and promoting faster recovery.

Recommended Use:

1 Scoop for increased pumps and performance while delivering smooth and crash-free energy!

Formula Highlights (Per 1 Scoop)

L-Citrulline (6,000mg): A non-essential amino acid that plays a key role in the production of nitric oxide. Nitric oxide acts as a vasodilator, relaxing blood vessels and enhancing blood flow. This results in improved oxygen and nutrient delivery to muscles during exercise, boosting overall performance.

Beta-Alanine (5,000mg): A non-essential amino acid that promotes the production of carnosine, which helps buffer the buildup of lactic acid during exercise. By buffering muscle acidity, Beta-Alanine helps delay muscular fatigue and improve endurance.

Nitrosigine® (1,500mg): Nitrosigine® is a patented complex of Bonded Arginine Silicate clinically studied and proven to boost nitric oxide production for improved blood flow

Caffeine Anhydrous (200mg): A fast-acting and smooth source of caffeine, providing a quick energy boost to support focus, stamina, and performance without jitters

CitraPeak® (200mg): Glucosyl-Hesperidin is a citrus derived compound that helps support circulation and reduces oxidative stress during exercise. It improves blood flow and endurance while simultaneously reducing muscular fatigue.

Dynamine® (Methylliberine 40%) (62.5mg): Dynamine ® is a fast-acting compound that boosts energy, mood, motivation, and focus by stimulating key neurotransmitters. When combined with caffeine, Dynamine not only enhances its effects but can also extend its half-life by up to 200%.

name: L-Citrulline
description_html:
Introducing the newest single ingredient addition to the RYSE Element Series, pure L-Citrulline. L-Citrulline is a non-essential amino acid normally found in foods such as watermelon. L-Citrulline has nitric oxide boosting properties that make this a staple to stack with most pre-workout formulas.

Nitric oxide is a molecule responsible for vasodilation which allows more nutrients & oxygen delivery to your muscles at a faster rate. This results in better pumps, more endurance & an overall better cardiovascular performance.

L-Citrulline works by way of converting into arginine and has been known to increase nitric oxide & plasma arginine levels at a higher rate than L-Arginine itself due to the first pass effect where most arginine gets metabolized in the stomach prior to reaching the bloodstream.

Stacks amazing with: Blackout Pre-workout, Blackout Pump, Loaded Pre-workout and Element Pre-workout (coming soon).

FEATURES:

  • BETTER PUMPS
  • INCREASED ENDURANCE
  • PROMOTES CARDIOVASCULAR HEALTH

name: Loaded Creatine
description_html:
It's time to reach your maximum potential with RYSE Loaded Creatine. This versatile formula was designed to enhance strength, power, and endurance leading to your best self. It's time to maximize those gains and RYSE above.

Ingredient Highlights:

  • Creatine Monohydrate (4,000mg): The gold standard of creatine to enhance energy, strength, and muscular endurance.
  • Betaine Anhydrous (2,500mg):  A multipurpose molecule that increases the body's production of creatine, cellular hydration, and overall exercise performance.
  • Magna Power® (1,500mg): A unique molecule featuring creatine chelated to magnesium which offers the dual benefits of increased creatine absorption and the performance benefits of the essential electrolyte.
  • Creatine HCL (750mg): An additional source of creatine to ensure maximum absorption.
  • PeakATP® (450mg): A biologically identical form of Adenosine 5º-Triphosphate (ATP) that offers immediate functional energy. As creatine acts as a precursor to the body's main energy source (ATP), PeakATP® provides ATP directly to the body for increased energy and endurance.

name: Loaded Greens
description_html: Loaded Greens is an all-in-one daily health and wellness superfoods powder. Through the inclusion of Greens Balance and BettaBerries, Loaded Greens provides essential micronutrients, antioxidants, and vitamins to support natural energy and a healthy immune system. This superfood powerhouse also supports proper digestion and gut health with Sukre fiber. Furthermore, RYSE Loaded Greens contains zero artificial colors, flavors, or sweeteners while providing best-in-class taste!

name: Loaded Pre
description_html:
Pump. Energy. Strength. 

Experience the power of science and flavor combined! RYSE Loaded Pre-Workout utilizes clinical doses of research-backed ingredients to make sure that you are getting the most out of your workouts. Our unique formula produces a surge of pumps, energy and focus in the gym. This is all accomplished without the dreaded crash afterwards.

  • 4.5 grams of Pure L-Citrulline per scoop for explosive pumps
  • Potent combination of NooTropic ingredients including 10mg Thinkamine™ to boost focus with no crash afterwards
  • 3.5G of Beta Alanine to push through muscle fatigue
  • 120MG of ZumXR™ for extended release caffeine aiding in no crash
  • Fully Transparent labeling and formula so you know exactly what you put in your body

name: Loaded Pre MAX
description_html:
Our latest innovation in the pre-workout category takes our flagship formula to the MAX. Loaded Pre Max utilizes premium, clinically studied ingredients to deliver a bolder, more intense experience designed for advanced users.

SUSTAINED ENERGY BLEND
RYSE Loaded Pre Max delivers 300mg of total caffeine from two powerful sources. Caffeine Anhydrous provides immediate, upfront energy, while zümXR® utilizes a patented time-release technology to support sustained energy with no crash.

EUPHORIC FOCUS
With the addition of Alpha-GPC and the dopamine precursor L-Tyrosine, Loaded Pre Max enhances mind-muscle connection while delivering a smooth, euphoric focus that keeps you locked in from first set to last.

POWER & PUMPS
Loaded Pre Max features a powerful combination of L-Citrulline and the AI-discovered ingredient PeptiPump®. This synergistic pairing supports increased blood flow, enhanced strength output, improved endurance, and long-lasting muscle pumps that outperform the competition.

ULTIMATE ABSORPTION
To ensure maximum effectiveness, Loaded Pre Max includes AstraGin® to help enhance nutrient absorption and support optimal ingredient utilization—so you get the most out of every scoop.

name: Loaded Protein
description_html:
RYSE LOADED PROTEIN Combines premium Ingredients with Added Benefits while Simultaneously Bringing Incredible 5 star reviewed flavors to the table! There is no reason you can't have the added benefits of a high quality protein formula without sacrificing taste. Let RYSE LOADED PROTEIN show you the difference!

  • 25g of Whey Protein with whey Isolate as its Primary Source
  • Added Prebiotic Fiber for digestive and health benefits
  • Added MCT's (Medium Chain Triglycerides) to help boost metabolism
  • Extremely easy to digest & no stomach bloat afterwards
  • 5 star reviewed flavors across the board

options.name: Flavor
values: Maple Glazed Donut by Nic Stella (RYSE CEO)

name: Protein Pancakes
description_html:
21g of protein, 3g of healthy MCTs, and 2g of prebiotic dietary fiber in a mouthwatering, easy-to-prep package.

It’s the Holy Grail of a clean diet; a quick, delicious, and healthy way to start your day. All too often, you’re either left eating breakfast that fits your macros but tastes like cardboard, or changing your cheat meal to Thursday at 6am. Not any more. Grab your griddle and FUEL YOUR GREATNESS!

name: Pump Cap Max
description_html:
Experience the hype with our newly formulated PUMP CAP MAX. Utilizing the latest research in blood flow and vasodilation technology, RYSE PUMP will cause a surge of blood flow into the muscle as you train. It will provide explosive vascularity and performance benefits. This stimulant free pump powerhouse formula can be taken on it's own or alongside other pre-workout products!

  • 1.5G of Pepform® Citrulline Peptides for highest bioavailability, studies show equivalent to or more effective than 3G of pure L-Citrulline.
  • 1G NO3-T® Betaine Nitrates for maximum blood flow to muscles.
  • 255MG of VasoDrive-AP™ for maximum vasodilation.
  • Convenient On-The-Go Capsules.

name: Pump Daddy v2
description_html:
Caffeine Free.

Pump Daddy Non-Stim Pre-Workout is everything you love about increased pumps and performance just without the caffeine. Late nights workouts, taking a break from caffeine, or stacked with your favorite pre-workout, the versatility is endless.

L-Citrulline (9,000mg): Starting things off in this maxed out formula, we have 9g of pure L-Citrulline which is a non-essential amino acid and is 1 of 2 major players in the production of nitric oxide. L-citrulline undergoes an enzymatic process of converting into arginine before becoming the usable Nitric Oxide. Which as we know, is responsible for increased blood flow, endurance, and nutrient absorption.

Betaine Nitrate (as N03-T®) (2,000mg): This leads us immediately into the second major play in nitric oxide production, Betaine Nitrate (as N03-T®). As L-Citrulline undergoes an enzymatic process, Nitrates undergo a natural or a non-enzymatic process of converting into nitric oxide. As the name does state, Betaine Nitrate consists of both Betaine and a Nitrate Molecule and we’ve actually increased the dosage of Betaine Nitrate from the original form to provide a higher yield of total nitrates.

Betaine Anhydrous (4,000mg): Alongside Betaine Nitrate we’ve also included 4g of Betaine anhydrous to yield over 5g of total Betaine. Betaine is a multipurpose molecule that increases cellular hydration, exercise performance, and the body’s production of creatine.

Creatine Monohydrate (5,000mg): And don’t worry, we made sure to include your daily recommended 5g of creatine monohydrate for maximized performance.

Beta-Alanine (6,400mg): But speaking of performance, there is a clinical dose at 6.4g of  Beta-Alanine in Pump Daddy. A quick breakdown if you didn't know, beta-alanine combines with Histidine in our bodies to produce carnosine. Carnosine acts as a buffer against the buildup of acidic compounds which are formed during exercise. Buffering the acidity of our muscles can delay muscular fatigue and improve muscular endurance.

VasoDrive-AP (508mg): Now that we have the basics covered, we additionally added VasoDrive-AP. VasoDrive is a Lactotripeptide that can help extend the length of the “Pump” as well as increase cognitive performance

CitraPeak® Glucosyl-Hesperdin (200mg): CitraPeak is a citrus derived ingredient that presents the same biological functions of regular hesperidin. Citrapeak helps increase overall blood circulation while also providing a slight yet pleasant thermogenic effect. 

Astragin (50mg): We know this formula is hefty and that’s why we went ahead and added 50mg of Astragin® to ensure maximum absorption so that nothing goes to waste!

name: RYSE Energy Drink
description_html: RYSE Energy delivers clean, bloat-free energy with 150mg of natural caffeine, 8g of functional protein, gut-friendly prebiotics, and zero sugar to power your day with purpose and performance.

name: RYSE Fuel Energy Drink
description_html: RYSE Fuel™ combines the perfect amount of clean, all-day energy from 200mg of natural caffeine combined with an efficacious dose of focus & flow enhancing ingredients to deliver an incredible energy experience. Finish that off with a blast of delicious flavors & you’ll see why we call this magic in a can! #FuelUp

name: RYSE Script Tee
RYSE x Blender Bottle
description_html:
Lockable. Rounded base. Push-Button open.

Strada™ x RYSE is the ultimate shaker cup. The bottle’s a spill-proof locking lid opens and closes with the touch of a button. A flexible, ergonomic carry loop provides a comfortable hold. The powerful mixing system utilizes the BlenderBall wire whisk to mix even the most stubborn protein powder, and a rounded base ensures a smooth blend. Made from durable, stain- and odor-resistant Eastman Tritan plastic, the BlenderBottle Strada is simplicity at its best.

name: RYSE x Ice Shaker
description_html:
• Shaker Lid: Easy to hold carrying handle, easy open pop top and comes with a removable agitator that twists into the lid - The shaker lid blends protein powder with ease.

  • Our Same great 26oz stainless steel bottle now with a durable navy powder coating with a navy silicone band.

  • Premium Quality Double Wall Vacuum Insulated Protein Shaker Bottle that will keep your drink hot for up to 12 hours or cold for 30+ hours.

  • Kitchen grade premium stainless steel cup that does not absorb odor. No more smelly plastic shaker bottles! Odor resistant metal cup makes it perfect for pre workout, juices, protein powder shakes, BCAAs, coffee, smoothies, martinis, cocktails, ice tea, and water.

  • Sweat proof bottle, no more wet cold hands and sweat rings all over your tables. The double wall vacuum insulated bottle prevents condensation from building up on the bottle by preventing cold or heat from transferring to the outside of the bottle.

  • Tapered bottle design that is easy to fill with measurement markings inside the bottle and fits all standard size cup holders. Bring your portable Ice Shaker cup to the gym, office, pool, beach, camping, hunting, fishing, tailgating, yoga, biking, road trips, hiking, sports games, everywhere!
